body:
## Rationale

Third batch of signature lick pages for drummers with active GSC/audience signals not covered in batches 1-5.

**Proven format:** Igor Cavalera lick pages are in the top-10 GA4 pages (after homepage and /drummers). Batches 2 (#2311, Greiner+Jordison), 3 (#2323, Hoglan/Lombardo/Haake), 4 (#2360, Flo/Inferno/Jaska), 5 (#2413, Lars/Danny/Brann) all promote as high-priority. This batch adds 3 more drummers with confirmed audience signals.

### Eloy Casagrande (roster #7)
- GSC signal: 19 impressions / 5.26% CTR — active searching audience
- Lick 1: Metallica M72 tour live thunderous double-bass patterns (distinct from studio)
- Lick 2: Sepultura 'Machine Messiah' polyrhythmic groove (his signature transition work)
- Lick 3: Eloy's Latin-influenced fill patterns (Brazilian heritage in metal context)

### George Kollias (roster #6)
- Known for world-record BPM single strokes (280 BPM confirmed); massive death metal tech-drumming audience
- Lick 1: 'Annihilation of the Wicked' extreme blast beat pattern at sub-250 BPM
- Lick 2: 'Those Whom the Gods Detest' alternating-foot double-bass acceleration pattern
- Lick 3: Kollias signature one-handed roll technique (used in live clinics)

### Paul Mazurkiewicz (roster #51)
- Cannibal Corpse = best-selling death metal band; Mazurkiewicz has been their drummer since 1988
- Lick 1: 'Hammer Smashed Face' iconic death metal groove (most recognized CC riff)
- Lick 2: 'Stripped, Raped and Strangled' mid-tempo blast-beat variation
- Lick 3: 'Evisceration Plague' death metal cymbal + tom combo pattern

**Dedup confirmed:** NOT in batches 1-5 open proposals. NOT in signatureLicks data (existing licks cover Igor Cavalera, Matt Greiner, Joey Jordison — see GA4 top pages). Net-new for all 3 drummers.

## Files to touch
Per existing lick batch pattern (see batches 1-5 implementations):
- packages/frontend/data/licks/eloy-casagrande.js — 3 lick entries
- packages/frontend/data/licks/george-kollias.js — 3 lick entries
- packages/frontend/data/licks/paul-mazurkiewicz.js — 3 lick entries
- public/llms/licks/eloy-casagrande-[lick-slug].md (×3)
- public/llms/licks/george-kollias-[lick-slug].md (×3)
- public/llms/licks/paul-mazurkiewicz-[lick-slug].md (×3)

## Quality gate (per lick page)
- ≥200 words description + tab notation or step-by-step breakdown
- Internal links to drummer profile page
- BPM and technique metadata
- Video reference where available (YouTube embed)

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves: 'eloy casagrande drum licks', 'george kollias blast beat tutorial', 'paul mazurkiewicz death metal drumming', 'cannibal corpse drum patterns'. GA4-proven format — Igor lick pages are top organic destinations.

## Verify
1. 9 lick pages render at /drummers/[slug]/licks/[lick-slug]
2. LLM files at /llms/licks/[slug].md
3. Each drummer's hub page shows new licks
4. Sitemap updated via SIGNATURE_LICKS data module
5. BPM metadata renders in Quick Facts

## Done
[ ] 3 lick data files created
[ ] 9 LLM companion files created
[ ] Pages render and appear in sitemap
title: SEO batch: Lick pages batch 6 — Eloy Casagrande + George Kollias + Paul Mazurkiewicz (~9 lick pages + 3 LLM files)
